channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Tree with dead bough which needs pruning, 1st May
item.description:
Tree on the grass verge on pavement outside 33 Caernarvon Road, Hatherley
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 33, Caernarvon Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 1st May
item.description:
15db Pothole CW 500x600x60mm approx Road closure with 15db Stats (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 1st May
item.description:
15DB CW: Pothole 1100mmx700mmx53mm TM: temporary road closure W3w. Limo.undulated.allies (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 1st May
item.description:
15db Abrupt level difference CW 600x300x25mm Road closure with 15db Stats Prev concrete fillet (CW6 Abrupt Level Differences )
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 1st May
item.description:
Dropped kerb. Please lift and relay 920x280mm Standard TM with temp FW closure Stats (FW Kerbing Defects)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 1st May
item.description:
Pothole CW 400x400x50mm approx 2 way stop and go Stats Marked, not measured (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 1st May
item.description:
Loose and rocking tactile slab Please lift and relay. Also needs concrete fill alongside 400x400mm Standard TM with temp fw closure Stats (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Signs & Street Furniture problem, 1st May
item.description:
Missing bollard Replacement bollard required. Road closure (Damaged Bollard)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 1st May
item.description:
Pothole CW 1000x300x40mm approx Road closure Stats Not Marked, not measured (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 1st May
item.description:
15DB CW: Pothole 800mmx600mmx53mm TM: temporary road closure Stats required 1 x NSD Outside No 111 (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 1st May
item.description:
2 hr Former phone box converted into cash point. Door loose, void in door. Cables visible Please make safe with 4x 1m barriers with x 4 sandbags S81 raised Std TM (Unsafe Structure)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trees obstructing shared cycle/walk path, 1st May
item.description:
Section of trees along the bypass between Stoke Rd x road heading towards the island with Finlay Way are hugely overhanging the pavement. The head hight and restricted pavement width are both an issue. There’s not enough space for a bike to pass a pedestrian in some places and it’s dangerous

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A435, Bishop's Cleeve
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 1st May
item.description:
FW: Abrupt Level Difference 2000mmx200mmx21mm TM: Give and Take Outside Cheltenham Prep School (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -other CW6 problem, 1st May
item.description:
15DB CW: Edge deteration (Using FW Criteria) 600mmx300mmx32mm TM: temporary road closure Stats required Outside No 203 (CW6 Edge Deterioration)

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 1st May
item.description:
15DB FW: Abrupt Level Difference (Around Lamp Post) 300mmx700mmx31mm TM: temporary lane closure Stats required Outside 109 Bath Road (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)

item.description:
